Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, here are the neighbor atoms of atom index 10 (element: C):

**Neighbor Atoms:**
- Index: 9, Element: N
- Index: 11, Element: C
- Index: 15, Element: C
- Index: 28, Element: H

**Geometric Configuration Index:** 1944

The central carbon atom (index 10) is covalently bonded to one nitrogen atom (index 9), two additional carbon atoms (indices 11 and 15), and one hydrogen atom (index 28).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 10 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
